大穴探索はなし、モンスター発見の報告もない。<br>前線基地にしては平和な日だな:
No Abyss exploration scheduled, no monster sighting reports. For a
Frontline Base, this is a peaceful day.
ふわぁ……。最近働き詰めだったし、<br>今日はダラダラとこの平和を満喫させても:
Ahh... I've been working nonstop lately, so today I'll just laze around
and enjoy this peace.
……短い平和だったな。<br>どうしたんだヒュメナ？ そんなに焦って……:
...A short-lived peace. What's wrong, Humena? You seem so
panicked...
お、追われてるのっ！<br>お願い、助けてっ！: I'm being chased! Please, help me!
追われてるって、誰から――<br>まさかモンスターか！？: Who's chasing you? Don't tell me it's monsters!
……なぜそんなことに？<br>道場破りでもして恨みをかったとか？:
...Why is that? Did you challenge a dojo and make enemies or
something?
そんなことしてないよ～！<br>ほ、ほらっ。この前、一緒に瓦割りをしたことがあっ:
I didn't do anything like that! L-look! We did that tile breaking
together the other day, right?
ああ、ヒュメナが１００枚割ったやつだな。: Yeah, the one where you broke a hundred tiles, Humena.
割った後、私が言ったこと……覚えてる？: Do you remember what I said after breaking them?
ふっふっふー。<br>これが水の精霊パワーだよ！: Fufufu! This is the power of my water spirit!
確か、そんなことを言っていた気がするな。<br>それが何だっていうんだ？: I think I recall you saying something like that. So what about it?
実は、それを聞いたみんなが水の精霊――<br>ウパちゃんの加護があれば強くなれる:
Actually, everyone who heard that got the wrong idea—they thought
they could become strong with the blessing of the water spirit, Upachan!
それで、水の精霊をよこせ―って、<br>みんな追いかけてくるんだよ～！:
And so they're all chasing me, demanding "Hand over the water
spirit!"
はあっ！？ んな馬鹿な――！<br>あ～、いや、そうも言い切れないか。: Huh! That's ridiculous—! Ah, no, I can't say that for sure.
ヒュメナの細腕からあんなパワーが出るとは信じられん。<br>精霊の加護って考えた:
It's hard to believe that power came from Humena's slender arms. It's
almost more natural to think it's a spirit's blessing.
うぅ……強い水の精霊に修行付き合ってもらってるから<br>ああ言っただけで、あの:
Ugh... I only said that because I've been training with a powerful
water spirit, but they don't have a blessing like that...
そのことについて説明はしたのか？<br>特別な加護なんてないぞって。: Did you explain that to them? That there's no special blessing?
言ったんだけど聞いてくれなくてぇ……<br>とにかくウパちゃんを奪い取ろうと追い:
I tried, but they won't listen... They're just chasing me to take
Upachan away!
まったく、あいつらときたら……。<br>精霊の加護で活躍してやろう――って考えで:
Man, those guys... They're probably so fixated on using the spirit's
blessing to make a big splash.
どうしよぉ～っ。みんな私のこと探してるし、私の部屋は<br>見張られてるしで、逃:
What am I gonna do! Everyone's looking for me, and my room's being
watched—I've got nowhere to run! It's so terrible!
ああ。俺は腐っても司令官。<br>ヒュメナの上司みたいなもんだし、このまま放って:
Yeah. Even if I'm a lousy commander, I'm still the Commander. I'm kind
of Humena's boss, so I can't just leave her, right?
し、司令官くぅん……！ ありがとぉ～～～！！<br>やっぱり君はいい子だよ！ 一:
C-Commander...! Thank youuu! I knew it, you're such a good boy! I'll
stick with you forever!
大袈裟だなぁ……あと、いい子言うな。: You're exaggerating... And quit calling me a good boy.
とにかく移動するぞ。ここには兵士が来ることもあるし、<br>とりあえず俺の部屋に:
Anyway, let's move. Soldiers might come here, so I think it's best if
you hide in my room for now.
宿舎に行くの？<br>でも基地のあちこちにウパちゃんを追いかけてる人がいるよ？:
Go to the living quarters? But there are people after Upa all over the
base, you know?
心配ない、こっちは前線基地司令官だぞ。<br>基地の中のことなら任せておけ。:
Don't worry. I'm the Commander of this Frontline Base. Leave
everything inside the base to me.
ね、ねえ、司令官君。<br>普通に歩いてるだけなのに、なんで誰とも会わないの？:
Hey, hey, Commander. We're just walking normally, so how come we
haven't run into anyone?
ここは主要施設を繋ぐ動線から外れた、裏道のようなところだからな。<br>詳しいや:
This is a kind of back route off the main corridors that connect the
facilities. Only people who really know the base use it.
なるほど！ やるね司令官君！: I see! Way to go, Commander!
とはいえ、少しは人と会うこともありそうだが……<br>ちっ、出くわしたか。:
That said, we were bound to run into someone... Tch, and there they
are.
くっ、あの精霊どこに行ったんだ……っ。: Tch, where did that Spirit go...?
うわ、ウパちゃんを探してる兵士さんだ！<br>どどど、どうしようっ？: Eek, it's the soldier that's after Upa! Wh-what do we do?
問題ない。<br>すぐに来るぞ、見ていろ。: No problem. Just watch—he'll be here soon.
何をしているッ？<br>仕事はどうした？: What are you doing? What about your duties?
あ……！ し、失礼しました！<br>すぐに戻りますっ！: Ah... M-my apologies! I'll head back right away.
まったく……サボりもほどほどにしろよ。: Honestly... don't slack off too much.
わ、行っちゃった。<br>今の人は？: Whoa, he's gone. Who was that?
人員が足りなくてな、この時間だけ警備に出てる上級兵だ。<br>これで安心して通れ:
We're short on personnel, so he's a senior soldier assigned to patrol
just during this time. We can get through safely now.
すごーい！ そんなことも知ってるんだ！ さっすが司令官君！<br>いい子の上に、:
Amazing. You even know stuff like that. As expected of Commander.
You're a good boy and a capable one too. I'll stick with you forever!
だから大袈裟……あと、子ども扱いは……はぁ、まあいいか。<br>ほら、今の内に俺:
You're exaggerating again... and don't treat me like a kid... *sigh*,
whatever. Come on, let's head to my room while it's clear.
お邪魔しまーす。<br>ここが司令官君の部屋なんだ～。: Coming in. So this is Commander's room!
どうにかヒュメナが自由に動けるように対処する。<br>それまでくつろいでいてくれ:
I'll take care of things so you can move around freely. Just relax until
then.
（そういえば、男の人の部屋って初めてだな。<br>なんだか知らない香りがする……:
(Come to think of it, this is my first time in a man's room. It has some
unfamiliar scent...)
（これが男の人の匂い？ それとも司令官君の……）: (Is this what a man smells like? Or is it Commander's...?)
ヒュメナ？<br>ぼーっとしているが大丈夫か？: Humena? You're spacing out, are you okay?
ひゃあっ！？ あっ、う、うん！ 平気だよ！<br>安全な場所に来て、ちょっと気が:
Hyaah! Ah, y-yeah. I'm fine. I guess I just relaxed a bit now that we're
somewhere safe. Ahaha.
別に構わないぞ。ここなら兵士に見つかる心配もないだろうし……<br>来たら、俺が:
Don't worry about it. There's no chance of soldiers finding us here...
even if they do, I'll send them packing.
でも、頼ってばかりなのは申し訳ないし……<br>そうだ！ お礼に私の得意料理をご:
But I feel bad for always relying on you... Oh, I know. Let me treat you
to my specialty dish as thanks!
うん、ちょっとキッチンを借りるね！: Yeah, I'll just borrow your kitchen for a bit!
どうぞ、ヒュメナさんの手作り肉団子パラダイスだよ！: Here you go! Humena's homemade meatball paradise.
お、おぅ……まあ、間違いなく美味そうではあるが……<br>やけに小さくないか？:
Oh, uh... well, there's no doubt it looks delicious... but aren't they
kinda small? If you're gonna heap them up, bigger ones might...
ウパちゃんたちはこの大きさが好きなの！<br>口が小さいから、食べやすいみたい！:
Upa and the others like this size! Their mouths are small, so it's easy
for them to eat! I'm sure you'll like them too, Commander!
せっかく作ってくれたんだから、いただくけど――: Since you went out of your way to make them, I'll have one, but—
団子を１つ手に取り、口に含む。<br>独特な風味と食感だが、意外と悪くない味だっ:
I picked up a dumpling and put it in my mouth. The flavor and texture
were unique, but the taste was surprisingly good.
ふふふー。自信作ですから♪: Fufufu! It's my pride and joy!♪
うん、ウパちゃんも食べていいよ。<br>はいどうぞ～。:
Yeah, Upa can eat too.
Here you go.
おい、なんかたくさん出てきたぞっ！？: Hey, a lot of them are coming out!
水槽にはウパちゃん以外も住んでるからね。<br>教会の秘術で、この水槽はとっても:
There are other spirits living in the aquarium besides Upa. Thanks to
the church's secret arts, this aquarium is actually a very spacious area.
ほー、精霊にとって暮らしやすい空間なんだな。: Huh, so it's a comfortable place for spirits to live.
うん……それでもやっぱり自然には敵わないから、<br>たまに海とかに行って、自由:
Yeah... but even so, it can't beat nature.
So I take them to the sea sometimes and let them swim freely, but...
そろそろ海に連れて行ってあげたいんだけど、今のままだと難しいし……。<br>困っ:
I want to take them to the sea soon, but it's difficult now.
I'm troubled... I need to resolve this soon for Upa and the others.
（自分のことよりも、ウパちゃんたちのことを考えているのか……。<br>ふっ、いい:
(She's thinking about Upa and the others more than herself...
Heh, who's the good one here?)
お前たちも安心しろよ？ 俺が絶対になんとかしてやるからな。<br>ほら、食え食え:
You guys don't worry, okay? I'll definitely sort things out.
Come on, eat up.
あ、司令官君のあげた餌を食べてる！<br>水の精霊は信頼してる人からもらったもの:
Ah, they're eating the food you gave them!
Water spirits only eat from people they trust!
守ってくれてることに気づいてるんだ。<br>信頼されたね、司令官君。:
They realize you're protecting them. You've earned their trust,
Commander.
精霊と仲良くなるってのは悪い気分じゃないな。<br>しかし水の精霊に懐かれても、:
Getting chummy with spirits isn't a bad feeling. But even if water
spirits warm up to me, it's not like they make me stronger...
いや、そうか！<br>これなら上手くいくかもしれない！: No, that's it! This might just work!
どうしたの司令官君？<br>何か思いついたの？: What is it, Commander? Did you think of something?
ああ、いい作戦がある。<br>ヒュメナも協力してくれるか？: Yeah, I've got a good plan. Humena, will you help me out?
もちろんだよ！<br>私にできることなら、なんでも言って！: Of course! If there's anything I can do, just say the word!
